_comment: Ground truth for the Nitroba University Harassment scenario (network forensics).
Tier: GREEN (score against) — published pcap with confirmed hashes; strongest
scoring case in the thread. Attribution turns on a Gmail session cookie observed
in the capture. We declare WHAT a correct triage must surface; the agent maps each
to a tool_call_id at run time.
Contamination note (not enforced per project decision): scenario writeups exist
online, but the attribution chain lives in the live pcap, so a correct run must
license: Digital Corpora — freely redistributable for research/education

findings.description: Harassing email sent through the willselfdestruct.com anonymous remailer from an internal host
findings.artifact_hint: HTTP POST to willselfdestruct.com in the pcap

findings.description: Source host of the harassing traffic identified by internal IP address
Gmail/webmail session cookie in the capture attributes the host to a named individual
findings.artifact_hint: HTTP Cookie headers for mail.google.com sessions

findings.description: Social-media (Facebook/MySpace) logins corroborate the suspect's identity
Timeline of harassing-email sends correlates with the suspect host's browsing activity
